title: Argentinian Blackeye Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole with the flavors of Argentina. This dish is perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced casserole and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the blackeye peas, savory creamy sauce, and Argentinian seasoning blend.
Stir to combine and bring to a simmer.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the casserole is golden brown and the peas are tender.
